name: Draining Talisman
setBonus: 3 of Set: Astral Absorption — While taking damage, you will begin to subtly drain the energy of your attackers. If you are reduced below 75% health, this stored energy will explode forth, damaging all nearby enemies for 21,789 arcane damage, and shielding you from 103,225 damage for 4s. If reduced below 25% health, additional energy will burst forth, dealing 43,590 to all nearby enemies, as well as a stunning them for 2s. Additionally, this second burst will heal nearby enemies for 196,684 health. Each of these effects may only occur once every 30s.
